hooks.command: python3 -c "import sys,os,json,datetime; (sys.exit(0) if os.environ.get('SELF_IMPROVE_RUNNING') else None); d=json.load(sys.stdin); p=' '.join((d.get('prompt') or '').split()); base=d.get('cwd') or os.getcwd(); dirp=os.path.join(base,'.claude','self-improvement'); os.makedirs(dirp,exist_ok=True); open(os.path.join(dirp,'prompts.log'),'a').write(datetime.datetime.now().isoformat(timespec='seconds')+chr(9)+p+chr(10))" 2>/dev/null || true

sh -c 'test -n "$SELF_IMPROVE_RUNNING" && exit 0; cd "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}" 2>/dev/null || exit 0; command -v claude >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; d=.claude/self-improvement; mkdir -p "$d"; now=$(date +%s); last=$(cat "$d/last_run" 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$last" ] || last=0; if [ "$last" = 0 ]; then echo "$now" > "$d/last_run"; exit 0; fi; [ $((now - last)) -ge 3600 ] || exit 0; echo "$now" > "$d/last_run"; test -s "$d/prompts.log" || exit 0; mv "$d/prompts.log" "$d/prompts.snapshot.log" 2>/dev/null || exit 0; SELF_IMPROVE_RUNNING=1 nohup claude -p --model sonnet "Use the self-improvement agent to append one concise entry to IMPROVEMENT_LOG.md for this period: read .claude/self-improvement/prompts.snapshot.log for the prompts and run git diff --stat for changes; keep it terse." >/dev/null 2>&1 &'
